TFER_DECISION.SUCCESS_GROWN_LANGUAGE_DRIVES_EMBODIED_C: A2_fitness clears the embodied TFER task and beats mute, per-agent scramble, and fixed-type controls by the frozen COOP_MUTE_COLLAPSE_MIN margin with paired CIs excluding zero; C_follow_caller fails; C_nospace differs from open so 2D is load-bearing; C_parallel differs from open so the angular sector lock is not a decorative scoring flourish; and A2 beats A5 by the frozen selection margin.
TFER_DECISION.SPACE_IS_DECORATIVE: C_nospace_abstract matches the open embodied arm within the frozen margin: decode alone explains the result, so the 2D movement/perception substrate is decorative.
TFER_DECISION.COOPERATION_NOT_ENCIRCLEMENT: C_parallel matches the open angular-sector arm within the frozen margin: mere co-location explains the result, so the encirclement claim is withheld.
TFER_DECISION.CHANNEL_NOT_LOAD_BEARING: Mute, per-agent scramble, or fixed-type controls do not collapse toward the chance floor by the frozen margin; the grown language is not carrying the cooperative type strongly enough.
TFER_DECISION.FOLLOW_SHORTCUT_EXISTS: C_follow_caller succeeds above floor. The caller beacon shortcut survived, so the design is rejected before any positive claim.
TFER_DECISION.TFER_NO_COOPERATION: The open embodied arm remains at the floor even with a grown type channel. This is an honest substrate/null result, not a relabeled success.
TFER_DECISION.UNDERPOWERED: Fewer than TFER_MIN_INSTANCES paired seed-arm instances are available for the frozen CIs, or a seed was dropped/duplicated.
TFER_DECISION.HARD_REJECT: A redline failed: motion read hidden target coordinates, marker truth leaked outside the resolver, the caller was not caged/off-marker, movers perceived each other as a shortcut, or the run used borrowed/pretrained weights.

summary.decision_text: Mute, per-agent scramble, or fixed-type controls do not collapse toward the chance floor by the frozen margin; the grown language is not carrying the cooperative type strongly enough.

honest_note: TFER uses grown in-memory FactoredSpeaker/FactoredListener populations; movers receive only the decoded type plus their own local typed-field bearings, and true marker coordinates/sectors are scored in resolve_tfer_lock. Verdict names are the preregistered ladder, not post-hoc relabels.
